issue: Centrifuge wouldn't start, threw E-04 error.
resolution: Staff attempted to restart multiple times and forced the lid. Resulted in broken latch. Action taken: BioMed called to repair latch and reset motor.
lessons_learned: Do not force lid on E-04. Recommend immediate power cycle and if unsuccessful, escalate.

issue: Monitor shut off during patient transport downstairs.
resolution: Battery was dead even though it was 'docked'. Found that dock pins were bent. Action taken: Replaced dock and battery.
lessons_learned: Always check dock indicator light to ensure actual charging is occurring.
